name: kbve-orc
title: KBVE Orc
author: kbve
description: Adds a custom isometric pre-rendered Orc Warrior as a neutral creature with a per-force reputation system. Kill orcs and their faction turns hostile; gift items (or buy a KBVE Orc Tribute from the Exchange) and they warm up to you. 16-direction Body+Shadow sprites with idle / walk / run / attack / death / hit / roar animations. Model: 'Isometric Orc Warrior Male' by engvee (https://engvee.itch.io/isometric-orc-warrior-male).
